channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Parents want safer phones for kids. These companies are answering the call.
item.description: As parents look for alternatives to unrestricted smartphones, a growing number of companies are building phones designed specifically for kids, from feature-limited mobile devices to minimalist home phones.

item.title: Apple and Google ordered by San Francisco attorney to take action against 'nudify' apps
item.description: Google and Apple were sent cease-and-desist letters regarding 13 apps on their respective stores.

item.title: 'You know who isn’t the hero? The killer of physical' — Angry PlayStation fans are flocking to the new Wolverine trailer
item.description: PlayStation fans angry with Sony's decision to end physical discs have descended on the latest Marvel's Wolverine to make their thoughts known.

item.title: 'macOS users may face real, sophisticated threats that require neither exploits nor any elevated access to succeed': ClickLock Stealer tries to trick Apple users into revealing their passwords
item.description: ClickLock bores its victims into complying and then steals all sorts of data.

item.title: L’action SpaceX a perdu 40 % de valeur en Bourse un mois et c’était quasiment prévisible
item.description: Un mois après l’entrée en bourse la plus chère de l’histoire, l’action SpaceX est déjà repassée sous son prix d’introduction. Une correction brutale, mais prévisible, après un démarrage euphorique, à l'exception d'un événement inattendu.

item.title: AI is turning the Smithsonian into an illuminated fever dream
item.description: Do museums dream of artistic sheep? An AI installation by Refik Anadol proposes an answer. The National Mall has become a hot spot for festivities this summer as the U.S. commemorates its 250th anniversary, hosting the (sparsely attended) Great American State Fair as well as a massive FIFA fan zone for the World Cup. The latest celebration arriving at the capital’s famous park is set to illuminate the red sandstone facade of the Smithsonian.For the immersive public installation titled Smithsonian Dreams, the artist Refik Anadol will project images from the museum’s collection, as well as abstr...

item.title: Voici la spectaculaire explosion de la fusée New Glenn de Jeff Bezos lors d'un test au sol en Floride
item.description: Une boule de feu gigantesque au-dessus de la côte floridienne, un pas de tir dévasté, et le plus grand revers de l'histoire de Blue Origin. En pleine ascension, l'entreprise de Jeff Bezos vient de perdre une fusée New Glenn lors d'un essai. Un coup dur aux répercussions jusque sur les projets...

item.title: Samsung’s redesigned Z Fold 8 with a wide display just leaked
item.description: Leaker Evan Blass shared images of Samsung's redesigned Galaxy Z Fold 8 just days before the July 22nd launch event where Samsung is expected to officially announce the phone. The leaked images show a shorter, wider foldable matching earlier leaks of the Z Fold 8. They also reveal some of its specs, including a Qualcomm […]

item.title: Cette enceinte connectée au look rétrofuturiste est bradée avec une réduction de presque 90 %
item.description: Avec son autonomie de huit heures, l'Elipson Lenny peut animer une petite soirée entre amis à prix réduit puisqu'elle est actuellement disponible pour 49 euros au lieu de 299 euros.

item.title: Is America ready for this quirky Jeep-looking EV that can park itself?
item.description: Are we living through a small car renaissance? There's the Slate Truck, Amble's dune buggy, and the Fiat Topolino, as well as a whole galaxy of kei cars and trucks from Japan that have their own built-in fan base. While microcar sales in the US are still as tiny as the vehicles themselves, there are […]

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Flip 8 et Z Fold 8 Ultra : les visuels marketing ont fuité avant l’Unpacked
item.description: À quelques jours de la conférence, Evleaks a diffusé les éléments promotionnels des trois pliables de Samsung. On y découvre surtout les configurations photo de chaque modèle, ainsi que le format élargi retenu pour le Galaxy Z Fold 8.

item.title: RugOne Xlink 7 review: A sophisticated rugged 4G walkie-talkie for populated wilderness, but not truly remote regions
item.description: The RugOne Xlink 7 is a compact device that uses mobile phone technology and bends it to provide a sophisticated walkie-talkie.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures TV Philips Ambilight en 2026 ? La sélection
item.description: Envie d'une immersion lumineuse totale ? On ne fait pas vraiment mieux que Philips et sa technologie dynamique Ambilight pour se plonger au cœur de l'action. Nous avons sélectionné pour vous les meilleures TV Philips.

item.title: Fallout 3 and New Vegas are getting remastered, and Bethesda just promised more Starfield support
item.description: Bethesda has revealed a new roadmap detailing upcoming games and more.

item.title: Florida man arrested for allegedly stealing over $200,000 in crypto using Steam game malware
item.description: Federal authorities have arrested a Florida man suspected of stealing at least $220,000 in crypto through malware-infected Steam games, as reported earlier by local news outlet Local10. In the complaint, officials accuse 21-year-old Zyaire Wilkins and co-conspirators of launching eight malware-embedded games from around May 2024 to February 2026, allowing them to infect about 8,000 […]...

item.title: Microsoft will straight up give you a free pair of Sony XM6 headphones right now
item.description: Score a free pair of Sony WH-1000XM6 headphones (worth $459.99) when you buy an eligible Surface laptop or tablet before July 31.

item.title: Amazon fixing bug that billed some AWS customers billions of dollars
item.description: Some Amazon customers logged on Friday to a surprise bill estimate claiming that they owed the tech and cloud giant billions in fees.

item.title: Galaxy S25 : cette nouvelle fonction IA va vous permettre de recadrer vos vidéos après coup
item.description: Des captures d'un build interne de One UI 9 ont fuité, et elles dévoilent une fonction caméra inédite baptisée My FanCam. De quoi donner un avant-goût de ce qui attend les Galaxy S25.

item.title: HP's 20-core Elite Mini 800 G9 is a heavy-duty desktop replacement — and it’s $700 off at Amazon
item.description: HP's Elite Mini 800 G9 is a 20-core business-grade desktop replacement.

item.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
item.description: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.

item.title: The Bose headphones I recommend to everyone are now $130 off
item.description: My favorite headphones are the Bose QuietComfort headphones, and right now, they're on sale for $229, saving you $130 off.

item.title: Dangerous new GoSerpent malware is apparently on the hunt for government secrets
item.description: The malware has been hiding in plain sight for half a decade, stealing all sorts of valuable secrets.

item.title: Plusieurs jours d’autonomie sans perte de puissance : le tour de force du processeur Snapdragon X2 pour PC [Sponso]
item.description: Des performances remarquables, une consommation électrique maîtrisée et des possibilités IA loin devant la concurrence : les puces Snapdragon X2 entendent bien révolutionner la manière dont on utilise nos PC portables.

item.title: New Audible deal just dropped: Get 3 months of Standard for 99 cents per month
item.description: A new Audible deal has arrived: Get three months of the Standard plan for just 99 cents per month through July 30.

item.title: La France annonce le blocage de Polymarket, le site de paris crypto qui fait un carton
item.description: L'Autorité nationale des jeux a ordonné le blocage complet de Polymarket en France. On vous explique pourquoi l'autorité a décidé de serrer le vis, deux ans après avoir interdit les paris aux Français. La plateforme attire plus de 200 000 visiteurs uniques français chaque mois.

item.title: Lyft’s CEO Says, ‘We’re the Good Uber’
item.description: David Risher insists that Lyft has lowered its prices and that customers who only check his competitor’s app are “leaving money on the table.”

item.title: Samsung's Freestyle+ projector is now available for $1,200
item.description: Samsung's Freestyle+ projector is a tiny unit which can play movies on the most uneven of surfaces.

item.title: Caviar is selling a ridiculous Lionel Messi-themed Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra a week before its official unveiling
item.description: And if you want one, you better save up, because it costs a cool $13,130.

item.title: The Best New Camping Gear at REI (2026): Tents, Coolers, Bikes, More
item.description: I tested REI’s best new and revamped outdoor gear of 2026. Here’s what’s worth buying, from tents and sleeping bags to coolers and bikes.

item.title: Kick off your weekend with a BOGO deal on a dozen glazed donuts at Krispy Kreme
item.description: In honor of its birthday, Krispy Kreme is offering a BOGO deal on a dozen glazed donuts with the purchase of any dozen donuts. Here are details on how to get this offer.

item.title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure is good. That’s why I wrote this review on it.
item.description: Remarkable's Paper Pure replaces Remarkable 2, and it is quite good.

item.title: Kalshi hands over Trump’s teleprompter operator to the feds. Here’s why
item.description: The operator, who has been working for Trump since 2016, is now on unpaid leave. President Donald Trump’s teleprompter operator is on unpaid leave after reports that he used his inside knowledge to make bets about the president’s speeches on the online prediction market Kalshi, the White House said Thursday.The firm’s enforcement chief said Kalshi contacted federal regulators about bets allegedly made about what the president would say in public addresses.White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the president is aware of the situation, which she described as “unfortunate” and “a disgr...

item.title: Soldes d’été : Amazon a gardé le meilleur pour la fin avec ces 13 ultimes promos Tech
item.description: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin dans quelques jours, mais Amazon a gardé ses meilleures cartouches pour la dernière ligne droite. Le géant du e-commerce vide ses stocks et multiplie les offres sur la Tech : voici notre sélection des meilleures offres à saisir avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.

item.title: US sanctions on rogue VPN accidentally break Telegram's short links worldwide
item.description: Telegram’s t.me domain was swept up in a global outage following US Treasury sanctions against First VPN services, causing millions of web links to break worldwide.

item.title: Dreo 318S : on a testé le climatiseur mobile compact qui promet le froid sans drainage
item.description: Alors que les canicules s’enchaînent, le seul ventilateur ne suffit plus. Le marché des climatiseurs s’emballe, et Dreo débarque donc au bon moment, pour la marque comme pour nous. Avec ses 7 500 BTU, le Dreo 318S veut proposer un produit compact, pensé pour les pièces intermédiaires et au rapport qualité-prix intéressant. Autant de promesses qu’il nous fallait vérifier, surtout en pleine journée à 30 °C. ...

item.title: Breathe easier with these deals on air purifiers from Levoit, Blueair, and Shark
item.description: With wildfire smoke impacting air quality, an air purifier can protect your and your home. We rounded up the best air purifier deals from Shark, Levoit, and Blueair.

item.title: Ex-MBDA engineer builds $1,100, 40g AI micro-drone using AMD phased-array sonar for YC-backed startup Tornyol to eradicate mosquitoes, currently restricted to 3-minute flights
item.description: Former MBDA engineer Alex Toussaint creates an AI mosquito-hunting drone using sonar, though battery limits restrict current operations.

item.title: No product? No problem. This Disrupt 2026 session shows how to get pre-seed funding with conviction, storytelling
item.description: It’s not just you: AI startups are taking in a huge amount of seed funding, and in the process making things harder for anyone looking for funding even at a pre-seed stage. We’ve covered the trend in detail, and at this year’s TechCrunch Disrupt event, we want to help pre-seed founders now being held to seed-stage […]

item.title: Europe’s tech reset gives the UK a chance to lead on security and sovereignty
item.description: The UK has a profound opportunity to become a trusted partner for secure, resilient digital infrastructure.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Max : l’appareil photo fuite, avec une très bonne nouvelle et une autre décevante
item.description: Un document issu du piratage de Tata Electronics révèle ce que proposeront les capteurs photo de l'iPhone 18 Pro Max. Il y a bien une nouveauté, mais c'est en majorité du réchauffé.

item.title: Robot lawn mower deal: This coupon knocks $700 off the Hookii Neomow X at Amazon
item.description: The Hookii Neomow X robot lawn mower is on sale at Amazon for $700 off, thanks to an on-page coupon. That's its best price ever.
